tagline: Enjoy A Crystal Clear Pool All Year Without the Hassle

hero.headline:
Crystal Clear Pools From South Florida's
CPO Experts
hero.subheadline: Every AJ Pools technician is CPO-certified, not just management. With 13 years serving Broward and Palm Beach County, we handle your weekly cleaning, repairs, and equipment so you never worry about your pool again.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Certified Professionals
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to major repairs, every AJ Pools technician carries a CPO certification and treats your pool like their own.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Vacuuming, skimming, brushing walls and tiles, emptying baskets, equipment checks, and precise chemical balancing. Your pool stays swim-ready every week.

cards.title: Pool Repairs & Equipment
cards.description: Pumps, motors, heaters, salt systems, and automation. We partner with Pentair, Hayward, Jandy, and Zodiac for fast, reliable repairs.

cards.title: Green-to-Clean Recovery
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp? We specialize in rescuing pools from algae and neglect. Crystal clear results in 48-72 hours.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing that keeps water safe, sparkling, and gentle on skin. pH, alkalinity, chlorine, and stabilizer always dialed in.

cards.title: Remodeling & Replastering
cards.description: Complete pool surface restoration, new tile, updated equipment, and modern upgrades that extend the life of your investment.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Health-code-compliant maintenance for condos, HOAs, hotels, and fitness centers. Dedicated service schedules and detailed reporting.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll send a CPO-certified tech for a free on-site inspection. Honest quote within 24 hours, no pressure.

steps.title: We Take Over From Here
steps.description: Your assigned technician handles everything on a consistent schedule: cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and water testing. All CPO-certified.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear year-round while you enjoy your weekends. Not satisfied? We come back and fix it free under our Happiness Guarantee.

about.label: Why South Florida Trusts AJ Pools
about.headline: 20+ Years of Hands-On Pool Expertise
about.description: Andrew started cleaning pools at age 13 and earned his CPO certification at 18. He founded AJ Pools in 2012 with one simple rule: every employee must be CPO-certified. Today, that commitment to expertise has earned us a 4.9-star Google rating, BBB accreditation, and HomeAdvisor Elite Service recognition across Broward and Palm Beach County.

features.title: Every Tech is CPO-Certified
features.description: Not just the owner. Every single AJ Pools employee holds a Certified Pool Operator certification. That is our non-negotiable standard.

features.title: 100% Happiness Guarantee
features.description: Not satisfied with any service visit? We come back and make it right at no charge. No questions, no hassle, no exceptions.

features.title: BBB Accredited & Elite Service
features.description: Recognized by the BBB and HomeAdvisor as a top-rated, screened-and-approved Elite Service provider. Your trust is earned, not assumed.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. No contracts, no hidden fees. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our 100% Happiness Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back and redo it at no additional charge. Andrew personally follows up on every concern because your satisfaction is not just a policy, it is the foundation AJ Pools was built on.

faqs.question: How quickly can AJ Pools start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response across Broward and Palm Beach County. Call us at (954) 803-0952 to get on the schedule.

faqs.question: Are all your technicians really CPO-certified?
faqs.answer: Yes, every single one. AJ Pools requires every employee to hold a current Certified Pool Operator certification. This is not an industry standard, it is our standard. It means the person at your pool understands water chemistry, equipment, and safety at a professional level.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: Never. We do not lock you into contracts. You stay because the service is excellent, not because of fine print. Cancel anytime with zero fees and zero hassle.

faqs.question: What areas do you service?
faqs.answer: We serve Coconut Creek, Boca Raton, Parkland, Coral Springs, Pompano Beach, Delray Beach, Deerfield Beach, Lighthouse Point, and surrounding Broward and Palm Beach County communities.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial pools and condos?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We service condo associations, HOAs, hotels, fitness centers, and apartment communities. Our commercial clients receive dedicated scheduling, health-code-compliant maintenance, and detailed service reports.

testimonials.name: Long-Term Client
testimonials.text: We have had AJ Pools service our inground pool since the first day it was filled. They are knowledgeable, courteous and punctual. Chemical water levels are kept within all required ranges and our water is always crystal clear.

testimonials.name: Condo Manager
testimonials.text: Andrew from AJ Pools helped rescue our condo pool after the previous company was fired for neglect and algae issues. The pool is now looking great and we couldn't be happier with the service.

testimonials.name: 6-Year Customer
testimonials.text: We have been using AJ Pools for 6 years. Andrew calls to check in on customer satisfaction and the office manager Alicia is extremely responsive. The service is consistently excellent.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Stays Crystal Clear?
contact.subtitle: Get a free on-site inspection and honest quote within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments — just CPO-certified pool care from a team with 168+ five-star reviews.
